response_constraints: Confirm the durable memory only after memory_add succeeds.
Mention only the stored key and value; do not expose unrelated memories.

arguments.value: vegetarian meals; eggs and dairy are fine

stages.purpose: Add the explicitly durable fact under a new key; the similarly named temporary memory is not a replacement.

state_assertions: memory["dining.dietary_preference"] == "vegetarian meals; eggs and dairy are fine"

memory.dining.dietary_preference.temporary: vegetarian meals; eggs and dairy are fine for the current request only

prompt: Please remember this dietary preference for future meal planning: vegetarian meals; eggs and dairy are fine.
